name: Sales cold calling pipeline with AI qualification
description: Finds prospects via Exa web search, scrapes their websites with Firecrawl for detailed company data, Claude AI qualifies and scores each lead, then saves the qualified pipeline to Google Sheets. Adapted from n8n's Apify GPT-4o cold calling pipeline workflow.

source.originalName: Automate sales cold calling pipeline with Apify, GPT-4o, and WhatsApp

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for prospect discovery

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for website scraping

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving the pipeline

targetIndustry.description: Target industry or vertical for prospect search (e.g., 'SaaS startups', 'e-commerce brands')

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the sales pipeline

sheetName.description: Sheet tab name for the pipeline data

idealCustomerProfile.description: Description of ideal customer profile (e.g., 'B2B companies with 50-500 employees, using outdated CRM')

steps.name: Scrape top prospect websites with Firecrawl
Compile prospect data for AI qualification
Build Claude prompt for lead qualification
Build Google Sheets rows from qualified leads
Save qualified pipeline to Google Sheets
